MULTIPLAYERCARD-FRIEND_FEE_POWER.title: Friend Fee
MULTIPLAYERCARD-FRIEND_FEE_POWER.descrip:
All teammates gain 25% less [gold]Gold[/gold] this run.
You gain additional [gold]Gold[/gold] equal to 2 times the reduced amount.
